title: sql returns error: ERROR 1292 (22007): Truncated incorrect INTEGER value
description:

delete from mysql_1 t1 where exists (  SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_2 a1 WHERE  t1.col_date NOT BETWEEN '1994-10-17' AND str_TO_DATE( '1994-10-17','%Y-%m-%d') + 1   ) /* QNO 2599 CON_ID 2407531810 */;





<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

results from mysql8:

MySQL [test2]> delete from mysql_1 t1 where exists (  SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_2 a1 WHERE  t1.col_date NOT BETWEEN '1994-10-17' AND str_TO_DATE( '1994-10-17','%Y-%m-%d') + 1   ) /* QNO 2599 CON_ID 2407531810 */;
Query OK, 0 rows affected (0.00 sec)


### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
mysql> delete from mysql_1 t1 where exists (  SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_1 a1 WHERE  t1.col_date NOT BETWEEN '1994-10-17' AND str_TO_DATE( '1994-10-17','%Y-%m-%d') + 1   ) /* QNO 2599 CON_ID 2407531810 */;
ERROR 1292 (22007): Truncated incorrect INTEGER value: '1994-10-17'

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, col_date DATE NOT NULL, col_int INT, col_float REAL);
INSERT INTO test_table (col_date, col_int, col_float) VALUES ('2023-01-01', 10, 1.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (col_date, col_int, col_float) VALUES ('2022-01-01', 20, 2.5);
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_table t2 WHERE t2.col_date NOT BETWEEN '2022-12-31' AND '2023-01-01');
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE col_int = (SELECT MAX(col_int) FROM test_table WHERE col_float IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: DELETE with date comparison triggers integer truncation error
